question: According to the chart data, during which period did the river water level increase by the larger amount?

options.C: Both periods have about the same increase
options.D: The pattern is too irregular to determine

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2000-2002: 69 cm → 260 cm (change 191 cm); 2007-2009: 183 cm → 30 cm (change 153 cm).
